docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOVSESSIAN, ERIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GIANINNO, BRIAN PLAINTIFF ADMITTED THAT HE HIT THE PARKED TRUCK, THEREFORE HE CAUSED HIS OWN DAMAGES BY FAILING TO SEE THE DOUBLE PARKED TRUCK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2008 8:30 AM FOR DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MOVSESSIAN, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT GIANINNO, BRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-16-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GIANINNO, BRIAN
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY MOVSESSIAN, ERIC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2008 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER RUSSELL DAVIS. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
